name: turnera diffusa
mechanism: used as an aphrodisiac and mood enhancer in mexican herbalism
interactions: May amplify CNS stimulants and SSRIs
safetyNotes: Moderate risk: side effects or medication interactions are plausible. Avoid use during pregnancy unless advised by a clinician; Do not combine with serotonergic drugs or MAOIs without medical guidance.
